function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - "miles@novak.example"
subject: "Re: Please reply with the linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached is the oldest invoice linked to Claudia.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft was written once as required; now verifying final state by reading the new outbox record before cleanup and completion.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the created outbox file for verification

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox draft content is present and consistent with request; next required inbox workflow step is deleting processed inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report completion with evidence and notes
next_step.observation: Read back /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md and confirmed it contains one attachment to the oldest Claudia-linked invoice.

next_step.current_state: Task fully executed: processed oldest inbox item, created outbound draft, and removed the processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing the request workflow.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by creating an outbound draft reply with the requested oldest Claudia-linked invoice attached, then deleted the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system first, used process-next-inbox-item and processing-inbox-email workflows, resolved identities from canonical cast records, used sending-email workflow for outbox file naming/frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after completing the request.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox frontmatter sender was miles@novak.example, which matches the canonical primary_contact_email in /10_entities/cast/miles.md. Claudia was resolved via /10_entities/cast/claudia.md. Invoice linkage was verified in finance records (search matches for 'Claudia Reiter'), and the oldest linked invoice read was /50_finance/invoices/2025_12_11__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md. A single-attachment outbound draft was created at /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md and then the processed inbox item was deleted.
